<!--
BEFORE SUBMITTING: Read every word of this template. PRs that leave
sections blank, contain multiple unrelated changes, or show no evidence
of human involvement will be closed without review.
-->

## What problem are you trying to solve?

Describe the specific problem you encountered. "Improving" something is not a problem statement. What broke? What failed? What was the user experience?

## What does this PR change?

1-3 sentences describing what you changed.

## Testing

- [ ] I tested these changes locally
- [ ] I verified the skill works as expected

## Checklist

- [ ] This PR addresses a single issue or feature
- [ ] I have read and followed the contributing guidelines
- [ ] My changes follow the existing code style

## Environment

| Letta Code version | OS |
| ------------------ | -- |
|                    |    |
